steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a command of evidence question. The decisive clue is that Gidra had an "expansive reach" despite only printing 4,000 copies per month, so the correct choice must explain how influence outpaced circulation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "The students who initially formed Gidra each contributed financially to its creation.": Funding sources say nothing about how the newsletter's reach exceeded its print run. ✗
  • "In addition to covering current events, Gidra also featured works of art and literature.": Content variety does not explain how 4,000 copies could influence more than 4,000 people. ✗
  • "Gidra was initially based out of the Asian American Studies Center at UC Berkeley.": Physical location tells us nothing about circulation or extended readership. ✗
  • "People would often give their copies of Gidra to others once they had finished reading an issue.": If each copy passed through multiple hands, actual readers would far exceed 4,000 — directly explaining the "expansive reach." ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
